stages.concept:
# Unit 154: without + 가정법 과거완료 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **without + 가정법 과거완료**에 대해 배워볼까요?

> **Without** your help, I **would have failed**.
> 네 도움이 없었더라면, 나는 실패했을 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **without + 명사 = If it had not been for ~** — ~이 없었더라면 (과거 가정)

> **Without** her advice, I **could not have succeeded**.
> = **If it had not been for** her advice, I **could not have succeeded**.
> = **But for** her advice, I **could not have succeeded**.
> 그녀의 조언이 없었더라면, 나는 성공하지 못했을 것이다.

> **Without** the map, we **would have gotten** lost.
> = **If it had not been for** the map, we **would have gotten** lost.
> 지도가 없었더라면, 우리는 길을 잃었을 것이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정리!

| | 현재 가정 (가정법 과거) | 과거 가정 (가정법 과거완료) |
|------|------|------|
| Without | Without ~, would + 동사원형 | Without ~, would have p.p. |
| If절 | If it were not for ~ | If it had not been for ~ |
| But for | But for ~ | But for ~ |

**Q. 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 것을 고르세요.**
"Without his warning, I would have made a big mistake."
1. If it were not for his warning, I would have made a big mistake.
2. If it had not been for his warning, I would have made a big mistake. ✅
3. Because of his warning, I would have made a big mistake.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 정확해요! 주절에 'would have p.p.
'가 쓰여서 과거 사실의 반대를 가정하고 있으므로, 'Without'은 가정법 과거완료의 형태인 'If it had not been for'로 바꿔 써야 한답니다.

🧑‍🎓 학생: 과거 가정에서는 If it had not been for! would have p.p.와 함께 쓰이는 거군요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 154: without + 가정법 과거완료 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 우리말과 같은 뜻이 되도록 보기에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
네 도움이 없었다면 나는 성공하지 못했을 것이다.
Without your help, I (     ) .
보기: would not have succeeded / would not succeed
> **정답** would not have succeeded (couldn't have succeeded)

---

**02.** 그 약이 없었다면 그녀는 낫지 못했을 것이다.
Without the medicine, she (     ) .
> **정답** would not have recovered

---

**03.** 지도가 없었다면 길을 찾지 못했을 것이다.
Without the map, we (     ) the way.
> **정답** couldn't have found (wouldn't have found)

---

**04.** 그의 조언이 없었다면 실수했을 것이다.
Without his advice, I (     ) a mistake.
> **정답** would have made

---

**05.** 우산이 없었다면 젖었을 것이다.
Without an umbrella, I (     ) wet.
> **정답** would have gotten

---

**06.** 다음 문장을 if 가정법으로 바꾸시오.
Without your help, I couldn't have passed the test.
> **정답** If it had not been for your help, I couldn't have passed the test.

---

**07.** Without the medicine, she wouldn't have recovered.
> **정답** If it had not been for the medicine, she wouldn't have recovered.

---

**08.** Without the map, we couldn't have found the place.
> **정답** If it had not been for the map, we couldn't have found the place.

---

**09.** Without his advice, I would have made a mistake.
> **정답** If it had not been for his advice, I would have made a mistake.

---

**10.** Without an umbrella, I would have gotten wet.
> **정답** If it had not been for an umbrella, I would have gotten wet.

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
네 도움이 없었다면 시험에 통과하지 못했을 것이다.
your help, I the test.
> **정답** Without, couldn't have passed

---

**12.** 지도가 없었다면 그곳을 찾지 못했을 것이다.
the map, we the place.
> **정답** Without, couldn't have found

---

**13.** 약이 없었다면 낫지 못했을 것이다.
the medicine, she .
> **정답** Without, wouldn't have recovered

---

**14.** 그의 충고가 없었다면 실수했을 것이다.
his advice, I a mistake.
> **정답** Without, would have made

---

**15.** 우산이 없었다면 비에 젖었을 것이다.
an umbrella, I wet.
> **정답** Without, would have gotten

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
네 도움이 없었다면 성공하지 못했을 것이다.
Without help your I couldn't have succeeded
> **정답** Without / your / help / I / couldn't / have / succeeded

---

**17.** 지도가 없었다면 길을 잃었을 것이다.
Without the map would we have gotten lost
> **정답** Without / the / map / we / would / have / gotten / lost

---

**18.** 약이 없었다면 낫지 못했을 것이다.
Without the medicine wouldn't she have recovered
> **정답** Without / the / medicine / she / wouldn't / have / recovered

---

**19.** 그의 조언이 없었다면 포기했을 것이다.
Without his advice would I have given up
> **정답** Without / his / advice / I / would / have / given / up

---

**20.** 우산이 없었다면 비에 젖었을 것이다.
Without an umbrella would I have gotten wet
> **정답** Without / an / umbrella / I / would / have / gotten / wet
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 154: without + 가정법 과거완료 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Without your help, I
________________________________________ at
that time.
could succeed
couldn't have succeeded
can't succeed
couldn't succeed
> **정답** couldn't have succeeded

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Without his advice, I
________________________________ in trouble
then.
would have been
was
would be
were
> **정답** would have been

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
____________________ his mistake, we wouldn't
have failed then.
With
If it were not for
Without
But for
> **정답** Without, But for

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 수 없는 말을 고르시오.
________________________ the Internet, I couldn't
have finished the report easily.
Without
But for
If it had not been for
If it were not for
> **정답** If it were not for

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
___________________________ his goal, our team
would have lost the basketball game.
But
If it had been for
If it were not for
If it had not been for
> **정답** If it had not been for

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
Without my smartphone alarm, I would have been
late for school.
But for my smartphone alarm, I would have
been late for school.
If it were not for my smartphone alarm, I
would have been late for school.
If it had not been for my smartphone alarm, I
would have been late for school.
With my smartphone alarm, I would have
been late for school.
> **정답** But for my smartphone alarm, I would have been late for school., If it had not been for my smartphone alarm, I would have been late for school.

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
But for the life jacket, they couldn't have survived in
the sea.
Without the life jacket, they couldn't have
survived in the sea.
If it had been for the life jacket, they couldn't
have survived in the sea.
If it were not for the life jacket, they couldn't
have survived in the sea.
If it had not been for the life jacket, they
couldn't have survived in the sea.
> **정답** Without the life jacket, they couldn't have survived in the sea., If it had not been for the life jacket, they couldn't have survived in the sea.

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
If it had not been for the accident, we could have
arrived earlier.
If it was not for the accident, we could have
arrived earlier.
But for the accident, we could have arrived
earlier.
If it were not for the accident, we could have
arrived earlier.
Without the accident, we could have arrived
earlier.
> **정답** Without the accident, we could have arrived earlier., But for the accident, we could have arrived earlier.

---

**09.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
Without his effort, we might have failed in the project.
If it were not for his effort, we might have
failed in the project.
If it had not been for his effort, we might have
failed in the project.
If it were not for his effort, we might fail in the
project.
If it had not been for his effort, we might fail in
the project.
> **정답** If it had not been for his effort, we might have failed in the project.

---

**10.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 고르시오.
If it had not been for the rain, the accident wouldn't
have happened.
If it were not for the rain, the accident
wouldn't happen.
But for the rain, the accident would have
happened.
If it were not for the rain, the accident
wouldn't have happened.
Without the rain, the accident wouldn't have
happened.
> **정답** Without the rain, the accident wouldn't have happened.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
But for his injury, he could have been a great
football player.
Without his injury, he could have been a great
football player.
If it had not been for his injury, he could be a
great football player.
If it had not been for his injury, he could have
been a great football player.
> **정답** If it had not been for his injury, he could be a great football player.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
But for your help, I couldn't have done it.
If it had not been for your warning, we
wouldn't have been aware of the danger.
Without her glasses, my grandmother
couldn't see anything.
If it were not for sports, the world would have
been a boring place.
> **정답** If it were not for sports, the world would have been a boring place.

---

**13.** 다음 중 어법상 어색한 문장을 고르시오.
Without your help, I couldn't have started my
own business.
If it were not for the medicine, my father
would have suffered from the disease.
If it had not been for my brother, I would have
been lonely at that time.
If it were not for his help, I would fail.
> **정답** If it were not for the medicine, my father would have suffered from the disease.

---

**14.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
우리가 저축한 돈이 없었다면, 우리는 그 차를 살 수 없었을
텐데.
Without our savings, we couldn't have bought
the car.
If it had not been for our savings, we couldn't
have bought the car.
If it were for our savings, we couldn't buy the
car.
But for our savings, we could buy the car.
> **정답** Without our savings, we couldn't have bought the car., If it had not been for our savings, we couldn't have bought the car.

---

**15.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
응급처치가 없었다면, 그는 죽었을 텐데.
If it had not been for first aid, he would have
been dead.
Without first aid, he would be dead.
But for first aid, he would have been dead.
If it were not been for first aid, he would be
dead.
> **정답** But for first aid, he would have been dead., If it had not been for first aid, he would have been dead.

---

**16.** 다음 우리말을 영어로 바르게 옮긴 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개)
그들의 언쟁이 없었다면, 우리는 즐거운 시간을 보냈을 텐데.
Without their argument, we would have had a
good time.
But for their argument, we wouldn't have had
a good time.
If it had not been for their argument, we
would have had a good time.
If it were not for their argument, we would
have a good time.
> **정답** Without their argument, we would have had a good time., If it had not been for their argument, we would have had a good time.

---

**17.** 다음중 의미가 다른 하나를 고르시오.
If it were not for the surgery, she could not
survive.
But for the surgery, she could not have
survived.
Without the surgery, she could not have
survived.
If it had not been for the surgery, she could
not have survived.
> **정답** If it were not for the surgery, she could not survive.

---

**18.** 다음중 의미가 다른 하나를 고르시오.
Without the reservation, we would have
waited for a long time.
But for the reservation, we would have waited
for a long time.
If it were not for the reservation, we would fail
for a long time.
If it had not been for the reservation, we
would have waited for a long time.
> **정답** If it were not for the reservation, we would fail for a long time.

---

**19.** 다음중 의미가 다른 하나를 고르시오.
If it had not been for your advice, I couldn't
have solved this problem.
But for your advice, I couldn't have solved this
problem.
Without your advice, I couldn't have solved
this problem.
If it had not been for your advice, I could have
solved this problem.
> **정답** If it had not been for your advice, I could have solved this problem.

---

**20.** 다음중 의미가 다른 하나를 고르시오.
Without the flood, the bridge would complete.
If it had not been for the flood, the bridge
would have been completed.
But for the flood, the bridge would have been
completed.
Without the flood, the bridge would have
been completed.
> **정답** Without the flood, the bridge would complete.

# Unit 154 without + 가정법 과거완료중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 두 문장이 같은 뜻이 되도록 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을

Without my brother, I could not have succeeded
as a writer.
→If  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  my
brother, I could not have succeeded as a writer.

---

쓰시오.
If it had not been for my brother, I could not have
succeeded as a writer.
→ Without  (     )   (     ) , he could not started
his own business.

그 경찰관이 없었더라면, 그는 위험에 처해졌을 텐데.
힌트 (     ) be
 the police officer, he  (     )   (     )  
in danger.

그 지도 애플리케이션이 없었더라면, 우리는 길을 잃었을
텐데.

If  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) , we would have been lost.

**05.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
그 히터가 없었더라면, 우리는 감기에 걸렸을 텐데.

But for the heater, we  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.

**06.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
교통체증이 없었다면 제시간에 그곳에 도착할 수 있었을
텐데.
힌트 (     ) the traffic jam, arrive / Without으로 시작
  (     )   (     )   (     ) , I  (     )  
 there on time.

**07.** 우리말과 일치하도록 주어진 단어를 이용하여 문장을

네가 도와주지 않았더라면 나는 그 곳을 찾을 수 없었을 것
이다.

  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     ) , I  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  the
place.
정답 If, it, had, not, been, for, your, help, could, not, have,
found

**08.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If  it  [have]  [not]  [been]  [for]
[patience,]  I  [couldn]  't  [have]
[completed]  [the]  [marathon.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)

**09.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
If  it  [had]  [not]  [been]  [for]  [that]
[director,]  [the]  [drama]  [would]  [not]
[be]  a  [big]  [success.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 be → have been

---

**10.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[With]  [BTS,]  [Korean]  [music]  [would]
[not]  [be]  [known]  [to]  [the]  [world.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 With → Without

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 154: without + 가정법 과거완료 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Without your guidance, I ________________________________________ at that time.
could succeed couldn't have succeeded can't succeed couldn't succeed
> 정답: couldn't have succeeded

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Without her encouragement, I ________________________________ in trouble then.
would have been was would be were
> 정답: would have been

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) ____________________ her carelessness, we wouldn't have failed then.
With If it were not for Without But for
> 정답: Without, But for

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 수 없는 말을 고르시오.
________________________ the dictionary, I couldn't have completed the essay easily.
Without But for If it had not been for If it were not for
> 정답: If it were not for

---

**05.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
___________________________ her assist, our team would have lost the debate competition.
But If it had been for If it were not for If it had not been for
> 정답: If it had not been for

---

**06.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) Without my alarm clock, I would have been late for the exam.
But for my alarm clock, I would have been late for the exam.
If it were not for my alarm clock, I would have been late for the exam.
If it had not been for my alarm clock, I would have been late for the exam.
With my alarm clock, I would have been late for the exam.
> 정답: But for my alarm clock, I would have been late, If it had not been for my alarm clock

---

**07.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) But for the safety net, they couldn't have survived the fall.
Without the safety net, they couldn't have survived the fall.
If it had been for the safety net, they couldn't have survived the fall.
If it were not for the safety net, they couldn't have survived the fall.
If it had not been for the safety net, they couldn't have survived the fall.
> 정답: Without the safety net, If it had not been for the safety net

---

**08.** 다음 문장과 의미가 같은 문장을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) If it had not been for the delay, we could have arrived earlier.
If it was not for the delay, we could have arrived earlier.
But for the delay, we could have arrived earlier.
If it were not for the delay, we could have arrived earlier.
Without the delay, we could have arrived earlier.
